text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time has come for our final showdown at the
Arima Kinen. Despite her temporary hiatus, Agnes
Tachyon is back in action and officially in the
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inspired by Manhattan Cafe's running and the
distant light she saw, Agnes Tachyon returns and
sets her sights on the frontier beyond the very
limits of Umamusume-kind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Agnes Tachyon declaring that the world
beyond is hers for the taking, Manhattan Cafe
comes to see a striking resemblance between her
and her friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having both guided and run alongside each
other, the two racers head for the gates—each
with their own destinations in mind.
